faqsYearly.title: How to export multi-year audit logs?
items: Select 'All Time' and download as CSV.

faqsMonthly.title: Why is my monthly bill fluctuating?
items: Billing depends on active user count.

faqsMonthly.title: How are monthly active users calculated?
items: Counts unique users who sent a message.

faqsMonthly.title: Where can I find the invoice for this month?
items: Go to Settings > Billing to download.

faqsMonthly.title: How accurate is the monthly forecasting?
